full_text:
Lü Boshe 呂伯奢
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Boshe (呂伯奢). Friend of Cao Song. Killed by the fleeing Cao Cao. Lü Boshe lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
